ptSource: Historical refrigerant — retired per Montreal Protocol (CFC-13 component banned)
verifiedBy: RETIRED REFRIGERANT: R-503 is no longer in service. PT chart not maintained — no current commercial application exists. For historical reference only, see archived ASHRAE Handbook editions.

primarySources.citation: ASHRAE Handbook of Refrigeration (historical editions, pre-2010) — archived PT tables for R-503 (R-23/R-13 azeotropic CFC blend).
primarySources.scope: Reference historical data only. R-503 contained R-13 (CFC) and was phased out under the Montreal Protocol; no production since 1996.

primarySources.citation: Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer (1987, amended).
